---
title: "vector_shadow.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/vector_shadow.py"
loc: 11
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.83
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.29
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating VectorShadow, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import VectorShadow and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `VectorShadow`
- `__init__`
- `search`
- `build_index`
